ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that manufactures the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier that provides the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "features" TEXT /* Key features of the product */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the product is featured */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the catalog */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "shipping_details" TEXT /* Shipping details of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "rating" REAL /* Supplier rating based on performance */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for delivery in days */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the order is paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "date_shipped" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "date_delivered" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
column_names: ID of the brand that manufactures the product
ID of the supplier that provides the product
ID of the category the product belongs to
Current inventory level of the product
Stock Keeping Unit for the product
Number of reviews for the product
Flag to indicate if the product is featured
Date when the product was added to the catalog
Date when the product was last modified

Average lead time for delivery in days
Flag to indicate if the supplier is active
ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories)
ID of the customer who placed the order
